sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ نِزَارٌ نُقُودَهُ وَذَهَبَ إِلَى السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Nizar je uzeo novac i otišao na pijacu.
sentences.translationEn: Nizar took his money and went to the market.

sentences.translation: Htio je kupiti poklon za mlađeg brata.
sentences.translationEn: He wanted to buy a gift for his younger brother.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الأَشْيَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَخْتَارَ.
sentences.translation: Pogledao je mnoge stvari prije nego što je odabrao.
sentences.translationEn: He looked at many things before choosing.

sentences.translation: Kupio je malu igračku po odgovarajućoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: He bought a small toy at a suitable price.
